hero.label: ✦ Understand & Memorize
hero.subtitle: Lyremember gives you a line-by-line bilingual translation of your favourite songs, then helps you memorize them with interactive exercises.

why.label: Why Lyremember
why.p1: You hear a song in French, Spanish, Japanese. You find it beautiful, you play it on repeat — but the words escape you. You look up a translation, read it once, and it's gone.
why.p2: Lyremember puts each line next to its translation, then offers exercises so the lyrics stick.
why.p2_em: Until you can sing without looking.

points.title: You listen
points.desc: A song on repeat, in a language you don't master.

points.title: You understand
points.desc: Every line displayed with its translation, in the language of your choice.

points.title: You remember
points.desc: Progressive exercises until you can sing the lyrics unaided.

donate.p: Pretty cool, right? Of course, a small financial thank-you is always appreciated.

cta_section.label: ✦ Early access
cta_section.p: The app is in development. Sign up to be notified when it launches.

header.label: ✦ Features
header.subtitle: Two focuses, three screens — everything you need to go from passive listening to mastering lyrics.

lyre.title: My
lyre.desc: Your song collection with line-by-line bilingual reading. Every line is shown in the original language with its translation below — in the language of your choice.

add.title: a song
add.desc: The floating action button (FAB) opens a form to enrich your Lyre. Search directly via the API or manually enter the title, lyrics and a personal note.

memorize.desc: Four progressive learning methods to go from understanding to full memorization, song by song, line by line.

methods.name: Fill-in-the-blank
methods.desc: Find the hidden words in context

methods.name: First letter
methods.desc: Only the first letter of each word is shown

methods.name: Karaoke
methods.desc: Lyrics scroll by — follow the rhythm

methods.name: Flashcards
methods.desc: Line by line, test your memory

cta.label: ✦ Ready to start?
cta.title: Your first song is waiting
cta.subtitle: Add a song, read its bilingual translation, then test yourself with the exercises.

header.label: ✦ Early access
header.subtitle: Lyremember is in development. Sign up to receive a notification when it launches on iOS and Android.

form.disclaimer: No spam. Just a notification when we launch.
form.disclaimer2: You can unsubscribe at any time.

items.title: My Lyrics
items.desc: Line-by-line bilingual reading of all your songs, in the language of your choice.

items.title: Memorize
items.desc: Fill-in-the-blank, karaoke, flashcards and first letter — four progressive methods.

items.title: 7 languages
items.desc: English, French, Spanish, German, Italian, Japanese, Portuguese — and more to come.

legal.notice: This page is only available in French as it concerns French law.
